title: Mod Gallery — Public Listing, Submission Form & Search

requirements.text: Extend the backend actor to store mods with the following fields: name, description, features (list of strings), author name, category, and creation timestamp. All stored mods must be publicly readable without authentication.

quotes: Mod Ekleme — Kullanıcılar mod adı, açıklaması, özellikleri, yazar adı gibi tüm bilgileri girerek mod paylaşabilir

acceptanceCriteria: A Motoko stable data structure stores each mod with: id, name, description, features (array of text), author, category, and createdAt timestamp.
A public query method returns all mods sorted newest-first.
An update method accepts the mod fields and persists a new mod entry.

requirements.text: Create a mod submission form that allows any user to add a new mod with fields: Mod Name, Description, Features (comma-separated or multi-entry), Author Name, and Category. The form must validate that Name and Author are not empty before submission.

quotes: Mod Ekleme — Kullanıcılar mod adı, açıklaması, özellikleri, yazar adı gibi tüm bilgileri girerek mod paylaşabilir

acceptanceCriteria: Form has inputs for: Mod Name, Description, Features, Author Name, Category.
Submitting with an empty Name or Author shows a validation error.
On successful submission the form clears and the mod appears in the public list.
A loading/disabled state is shown while the submission is in progress.

requirements.text: Display all submitted mods in a public gallery listing visible to every visitor (no login required). Each mod card must show: Mod Name, Description, Features (as badges), Author Name, Category, and formatted creation date.

quotes: Mod kartlarında tüm bilgiler gösterilir (ad, açıklaması, özellikleri, yazarı ve tarihi)

acceptanceCriteria: Gallery page loads and shows all mods without requiring login.
Each card displays: name, description, all features as styled badges, author, category, and date.
An empty state message is shown when no mods have been submitted yet.

requirements.text: Add a search bar at the top of the gallery that filters the displayed mod list in real time by mod name or by any feature text. The search must be case-insensitive.

quotes: Arama özelliği — mod adına veya özelliğine göre arama yapılabilsin
ara dım modun özelliği ni yazdımda rahatlıyrum

acceptanceCriteria: A search input is prominently displayed above the mod list.
Typing in the search box instantly filters the mod cards to those whose name or any feature contains the search string (case-insensitive).
A 'No results found' message is shown when the search matches nothing.
Clearing the search input restores the full mod list.

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive visual theme to the Mod Gallery app. Use a dark, game-inspired aesthetic with rich accent colors (e.g., deep charcoal backgrounds, vivid teal or amber highlights), bold typography for mod titles, and card-based layout. Enforce the theme consistently across all pages and components.
acceptanceCriteria: The app uses a dark background with a consistent accent color throughout.
All mod cards share the same visual style.
Typography is clear and readable with distinct hierarchy between titles and body text.
The theme is applied globally (header, form, cards, search bar).

constraints: All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo).
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
The mod gallery listing must be readable without authentication.
nonGoals: User authentication or login-gated mod submission.
Pagination (client-side filtering is sufficient for now).

required: Dark game-themed banner with glowing grid lines and abstract controller/gear silhouettes on a deep charcoal background (gallery-banner.dim_1200x300.png)
